summary: Iteration 1 — Full e2e verification of Biz-Salama phone-login normalization, PWA Install modal, role-based verify views, counter-offer/edit/accept flows and fee invariant. All 15 backend tests PASS + all critical UI checks PASS.

minor.issue: allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will reject cookies. Login still works because frontend also accepts session_token in response body + Authorization: Bearer header. Recommend pinning origins to exact URLs (e.g., preview + prod) when credentials are enabled.

Commission/platform_fee stored at create-time use OLD (pre-fee-split) formula via _compute_three_party_split before supplier accepts, but these are overwritten on supplier-response. Not a functional bug but duplicate computation – could be deferred to accept step.
Does not enforce password minimum length (accepted 'Demo1234!' but also accepts any length >=1 via Pydantic). test_credentials doc says min 6 chars but no validator in UserCreate model.

issues: Heading 'Kiungo halipatikani' appears on light/washed-out background with very low contrast in screenshot — may be hard to read on some displays

action_items: (Minor) Tighten CORS: replace '*' with explicit preview + prod origins when allow_credentials=True
(Minor) Add Pydantic min_length=6 validator on UserCreate.password to match documented policy
(Optional) Improve contrast of error heading on /supplier-confirm invalid-link state
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 3481 lines — split into routers (auth, escrow_2p, escrow_3p, audit, rates) for maintainability
Three-party create pre-computes commission/platform_fee from possibly-stale supplier_cost; these fields later get overwritten on supplier approve — clean up by storing split ONLY after accept
JWT_SECRET default fallback exists in .env but marked 'change-in-prod' — ensure rotation policy before production
_sign_verify_token uses 64-bit truncation (16 hex). Acceptable for this use case but mention brute-force resistance in docs
test_credentials: Primary: phone +255712345678 / password test1234 (verified via all 5 formats). Fresh users created per-test with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Each test that needs a fresh hawker/supplier registers one on-the-fly with randomized phone suffix to avoid duplicate-key errors. Transactions use 3P_ IDs auto-generated by backend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_biz_salama.py is idempotent; re-running creates new users but that's fine. If you add new fee config, update fee-invariant constants (supplier_payout=1,617,000 / supply_fee=33,000 / buyer_fee=55,500 / commission=144,500 / platform_fee=88,500 for buyer_price=1,850,000 and supplier_cost=1,650,000). Role-based verify uses HMAC with JWT_SECRET from backend/.env — test _hmac_sig helper mirrors backend _sign_verify_token. PWA Install modal content verified: 'Install Biz-Salama' title + emerald 'Why install?' section + amber 'Seeing React App' section all render correctly. Login placeholder is '+255 712 345 678' on both /login and /register. The primary reported bugs (login failures across phone formats + Install App 'React App' confusion) are FULLY RESOLVED.
rca_of_the_issue: Login failures: root cause was strict string-equality on phone in DB lookup. Fix: normalize_tz_phone() in server.py plus last-9-digit regex fallback for legacy records. Verified all 5 formats (+255712345678, 255712345678, 0712345678, 712345678, '+255 712 345 678') authenticate same user. Install App confusion: browsers cached old manifest with name='React App'. Fix: InstallAppButton modal now includes amber warning directing users to Remove/Uninstall the old icon and re-install — the new install will show 'Biz-Salama'. Both modals (emerald Why install? + amber React App warning) render correctly in the live preview.
